signals.headline: US and Iran to Hold Second Round of Talks Before Ceasefire Expires | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran to Hold Second Round of Talks Before Ceasefire Expires | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Sources confirm Washington and Tehran are arranging discussions before the current ceasefire ends next week, driving a risk rally in markets with S&P 500 near records, Asian stocks gaining, and oil prices steadying as worst-case scenarios fade.[2][3]  
This development, reported April 15-17, 2026, could
matched_markets: US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
